title: 恢复治理基线与历史归档不可变性
outOfScope: new Work Item implementation for R1-R11
changing repository visibility or publishing a release
modifying archive files whose content was not changed by the previous baseline commit

sources.reason: R0 objective, scope, dependencies, and acceptance evidence.
Historical archive evidence whose immutability must be preserved.
Current compatibility and archive invariant implementation.
Final PR ownership and append-only archive policy implementation.
Local and PR diff ownership preview implementation.

problemStatement: Restore the historical archive baseline without weakening append-only controls, then prove that current changes are uniquely owned and that no-op archive restores are handled from the current worktree.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: legacy archived Summary without summaryVersion remains valid
clean no-op archive restore is excluded from PR ownership failure
scenarioCoverage.reason: Requires the R0 regression implementation and final PR validation.

riskAssessment.reason: This task changes governance evidence handling and restores historical records; a false positive would hide unrelated PR changes.

executionDecision.reason: The R0 scope, evidence, acceptance, and verification paths are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review archive restoration, no-op restore handling, and complete ownership coverage.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All 119 pre-existing archived Summary files changed only by the baseline version-normalization edit are restored byte-for-byte to the parent baseline; newly added archive pairs remain untouched.
Legacy archived Summary files with no summaryVersion remain accepted by system invariants and are covered by regression tests.
A clean no-op restore is excluded from archive evidence ownership failure only when the current worktree content matches the parent baseline; dirty archive modifications remain rejected.
The local diff ownership preview and final PR audit report no unowned, ambiguous, out-of-scope, or archive-integrity errors for the R0 change.
R0 tests and all required AI/project checks pass, and the Work Item is archived before its scoped commit is created.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The initial acceptance found 119 existing archived Summary files modified in place, while the governance model requires archived evidence to remain append-only and legacy v1 summaries to remain readable. The PR/no-op restore path must also preserve ownership evidence when a later commit restores an archive file to its pre-change content.
constraints: Do not delete or rewrite archived Contract/Summary history except to restore the exact pre-change content already present at the task base parent.
Do not weaken append-only enforcement for dirty archive modifications.
Keep R1-R11 concerns out of this Work Item unless required for the R0 ownership and archive checks.
intent.rationale: A trustworthy governance baseline must distinguish immutable historical evidence from new append-only evidence and must not let a no-active or no-op restore path hide unrelated changes.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
